targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        ds.ts_datetime,
        ds.total_items,
        ds.good_read
    FROM dbo.device_statistics ds
    JOIN dbo.devices d
      ON d.id = ds.device_id
    WHERE ('${customer}' = 'ALL' OR d.customer = '${customer}')
)
SELECT
    period,
    total_parcels,
    good_read_pct
FROM (
    SELECT
        1 AS sort_order,
        'Year' AS period,
        COALESCE(SUM(total_items), 0) AS total_parcels,
        CAST(
            COALESCE(100.0 * SUM(good_read) / NULLIF(SUM(total_items), 0), 0)
            AS decimal(6,2)
        ) AS good_read_pct
    FROM base
    WHERE ts_datetime >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), 1, 1)
      AND ts_datetime <  DATEADD(YEAR, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), 1, 1))

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        2 AS sort_order,
        'Month' AS period,
        COALESCE(SUM(total_items), 0) AS total_parcels,
        CAST(
            COALESCE(100.0 * SUM(good_read) / NULLIF(SUM(total_items), 0), 0)
            AS decimal(6,2)
        ) AS good_read_pct
    FROM base
    WHERE ts_datetime >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1)
      AND ts_datetime <  DATEADD(MONTH, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1))

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        3 AS sort_order,
        'Day' AS period,
        COALESCE(SUM(total_items), 0) AS total_parcels,
        CAST(
            COALESCE(100.0 * SUM(good_read) / NULLIF(SUM(total_items), 0), 0)
            AS decimal(6,2)
        ) AS good_read_pct
    FROM base
    WHERE ts_datetime >= CAST(GETDATE() AS date)
      AND ts_datetime <  DATEADD(DAY, 1, CAST(GETDATE() AS date))
) x
ORDER BY x.sort_order;
